nasb.text: You shall not take vengeance, nor bear any grudge against the sons of your people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself; I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall not take vengeance or bear a grudge against the sons of your own people, but you shall love your neighbor as yourself: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 不可報復，也不可向你的族人懷恨，卻要愛你的鄰舍好像愛自己；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 不可报复，不可埋怨同胞，要爱邻如己。我是耶和华。
